title: verbascum leianthum
intro: Verbascum leianthum, also known as the long-leaved mullein or Verbascum leianthum, is a species of flowering plant in the mullein genus native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects, which have been attributed to its high content of saponins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Verbascum leianthum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Verbascum leianthum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications for skin and mucous membrane issues.
